subcodes.first_line: O ye who are associated with His Holiness 'Attar, give voice not to sighs and lamentations, neither seek ye sorrow and grief, though misfortune [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین حضرت عطار آه و فغان منمااید و اندوه و احزان مخواهید هر چند از مصیبت
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
